title: rhododendron × gandavense f. plenum
intro: Rhododendron × gandavense f. plenum is a hybrid plant species known for its compact, bushy growth habit and showy, funnel-shaped flowers. It is a derivative of the Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron hirsutum species, offering medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhododendron × gandavense f. plenum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in the form of tinctures, teas, or infusions, although its use should be limited and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
